title: stelis papulina
intro: Stelis papulina, also known as the spotted stelis, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Stelis papulina include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various infections, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
